div.p: This is a practical starting checklist. The final list may change after reviewing your case and the relevant authority requirements.
We review your requirement, service type, documents, and authority path.
You receive a clear document checklist and next-step guidance.
We coordinate applications, forms, appointments, submissions, or follow-up as applicable.
We update you until completion, approval, renewal, or final document collection.

Disclaimer: AL TAMKEEN provides corporate services coordination and administrative support. We do not present this page as legal advice. Government rules, authority procedures, fees, document requirements, and eligibility conditions may change. Official authority confirmation is required before submission.

div.h2: Speak with our team before starting paperwork.

t.t-value: 'UAE business setup'
'Business Setup Services'
'Guidance for mainland, free zone, and offshore business setup with trade licensing, initial approvals, and document coordination.'

[ 'Business activity and jurisdiction guidance', 'Mainland and free zone company formation coordination', 'Trade name reservation and initial approval support', 'Trade license issuance, renewal, and amendment support', 'MOA, corporate document, and establishment coordination', 'Investor visa and related government transaction support' ]

[ 'Passport copies', 'Visa or entry stamp copy where applicable', 'Emirates ID where applicable', 'Proposed trade names', 'Business activity details', 'Shareholder details', 'Office or tenancy details where required', 'External approval documents if applicable' ]
'Government transaction support'
'PRO Services'
'Professional support for UAE government transactions, company documentation, immigration files, labour processes, renewals, and official follow-up.'

[ 'Trade license applications, renewals, amendments, and cancellation coordination', 'Company establishment card, immigration file, and government portal support', 'Investor, partner, employment, dependent, and visit visa coordination', 'Emirates ID, medical fitness, and residency follow-up', 'Labour documentation, work permits, contracts, quota requests, and employee cancellation support', 'Official letters, NOCs, resolutions, certified copies, and corporate record support' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Emirates ID copy where applicable', 'Residence visa copy where applicable', 'Trade license copy', 'Establishment card or immigration file details', 'Passport-size photo where required', 'Labour or employment contract documents where applicable', 'Authority forms or previous approval copies' ]
'Visa and immigration coordination'
'UAE and International Visa Services'
'Document preparation and coordination for UAE visas, GCC travel, international visa applications, student support, and business mobility.'

[ 'Investor, partner, employment, family, dependent, and visit visa support', 'Entry permit, status change, residency stamping, renewal, and cancellation coordination', 'Golden Visa, Green Visa, freelance visa, and remote work visa documentation support', 'GCC and international visa application preparation', 'Appointment scheduling, itinerary, insurance, invitation letter, and cover letter guidance', 'Student, work, investor, and relocation documentation support' ]

[ 'Passport copy with sufficient validity', 'Photo as per authority or embassy specification', 'Current visa or residence copy where applicable', 'Emirates ID where applicable', 'Bank statement or financial proof where required', 'Employment, business, or sponsor documents', 'Travel itinerary and hotel details where applicable', 'Invitation letter or admission letter where applicable' ]
'Attestation, legalization, translation'
'Document Attestation and Legalization'
'Coordination support for educational, personal, and commercial document attestation, MOFA processes, embassy legalization, notary coordination, and legal translation.'

[ 'Educational certificate attestation coordination', 'Birth, marriage, police clearance, and personal document attestation support', 'Commercial document, trade license, MOA, board resolution, and invoice attestation coordination', 'MOFA, embassy, consulate, apostille, and legalization follow-up', 'Certified translation and legal translation coordination', 'Public notary, private notary, POA, affidavit, declaration, and certified copy coordination' ]

[ 'Original document or clear copy depending on authority requirement', 'Passport copy', 'Emirates ID or visa copy where applicable', 'Previous attestations or stamps if any', 'Company documents for commercial attestation', 'Authorization letter or POA where required', 'Translation copy where applicable', 'Embassy or MOFA reference documents if already available' ]
'Property, investment, and documentation'
'Real Estate and Investment Services'
'Practical coordination for UAE property search, sales and purchase support, leasing, investment planning, mortgage documentation, and property-related paperwork.'

[ 'Residential and commercial property consultation coordination', 'Property buying, selling, reservation, and transfer document support', 'Off-plan and ready property guidance coordination', 'Lease, tenancy, title deed, and handover documentation support', 'Mortgage and finance documentation coordination', 'Property management, rent, inspection, and maintenance coordination support' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Emirates ID or visa copy where applicable', 'Proof of address where required', 'Property details or title deed where available', 'Sale and purchase agreement or reservation form where applicable', 'Tenancy contract or lease agreement where applicable', 'Bank or mortgage documents where applicable', 'Power of Attorney or authorization letter where required' ]
'Corporate growth and advisory support'
'Business Advisory Services'
'Support for market entry, business planning, corporate structuring, investment documentation, restructuring, franchise planning, and SME growth coordination.'

[ 'Business planning, market entry, and expansion advisory coordination', 'Corporate structuring, governance, and risk management support', 'Startup and SME planning, licensing guidance, and growth strategy support', 'Investment proposal, business valuation, and due diligence documentation coordination', 'Franchise documentation and expansion planning support', 'Business restructuring, continuity planning, acquisition, sale, or merger documentation coordination' ]

[ 'Company profile or business summary', 'Trade license copy where applicable', 'Shareholder and manager details', 'Passport and Emirates ID copies where applicable', 'Existing corporate documents where available', 'Financial summaries or business plan where applicable', 'Investment, franchise, or expansion proposal where applicable', 'Any existing agreements or authority documents related to the request' ]
'Employee documentation and labour support'
'HR Consultancy Services'
'Support for employee documentation, onboarding coordination, labour process guidance, HR policies, payroll coordination, compliance, and recruitment-related paperwork.'

[ 'Employee onboarding document checklist and coordination', 'Labour contract, offer letter, and employment file support', 'HR policy, employee handbook, and internal process guidance', 'Payroll, leave, end-of-service, and employee records coordination', 'Recruitment documentation and candidate onboarding support', 'MOHRE, free zone, and authority labour procedure follow-up where applicable' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Emirates ID or visa copy where applicable', 'Educational or professional certificates where required', 'Employment offer letter or contract draft', 'Company trade license and establishment card where applicable', 'Existing employee records or HR policy documents where available', 'Salary, designation, and joining details', 'Authority forms or reference numbers where already available' ]
'Residency, mobility, and relocation'
'Global Immigration Services'
'Documentation guidance for residency, investor mobility, student and work visa files, family relocation, and international immigration support.'

[ 'Residency and long-term residence documentation support', 'Investor, entrepreneur, and business mobility guidance', 'Student visa, work visa, and family relocation document coordination', 'Application form, checklist, appointment, and status follow-up support', 'Translation, attestation, itinerary, insurance, and financial document coordination', 'Corporate and family visa management guidance' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Photograph where required', 'Current visa or Emirates ID where applicable', 'Educational, employment, or business documents where required', 'Bank statement or financial proof where applicable', 'Travel itinerary or invitation letter where applicable', 'Marriage, birth, or family documents for dependents', 'Previous visa history or refusal letters where applicable' ]
'Flights, hotels, tours, and religious travel'
'Travel and Tourism Services'
'Travel coordination for flight bookings, hotels, holiday packages, business travel, group travel, Umrah guidance, and international itinerary support.'

[ 'Domestic and international flight booking coordination', 'Hotel, resort, serviced apartment, and holiday accommodation support', 'Holiday, business, family, group, and educational tour package coordination', 'Umrah package and religious travel documentation guidance', 'Travel insurance, itinerary, reservation, and invitation letter coordination', 'Corporate, VIP, student, and group travel support' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Travel dates and destination details', 'Passenger names and contact information', 'Visa copy or residency details where applicable', 'Hotel or accommodation preference', 'Travel insurance requirement where applicable', 'Invitation or event documents for business travel', 'Special assistance or group requirements' ]
'Personal, business, travel, and property coverage'
'Insurance Services'
'Coordination support for motor, health, life, travel, property, business, marine, cargo, and specialty insurance requirements.'

[ 'Motor, health, life, and travel insurance coordination', 'Property, land, real estate, and business insurance guidance', 'Marine, cargo, aviation, engineering, and construction insurance coordination', 'Professional and specialty insurance support', 'Policy renewal, policy management, and claims assistance coordination', 'International insurance solution guidance where applicable' ]

[ 'Passport or Emirates ID copy', 'Vehicle registration card for motor insurance', 'Trade license for business insurance where applicable', 'Property or asset documents where applicable', 'Existing policy copy if renewing or comparing', 'Claim documents where applicable', 'Travel dates for travel insurance', 'Coverage requirement and beneficiary details where applicable' ]
'Driving licence, RTA, and vehicle documentation'
'Driving and Vehicle Services'
'Support for UAE driving licence coordination, international driving permits, RTA documentation, traffic file services, and vehicle registration processes.'

[ 'New UAE driving licence and first-time driving file guidance', 'International driving permit coordination', 'Traffic file opening, transfer, and driver record request support', 'Traffic fine, black point, and driver status inquiry guidance', 'Vehicle registration, renewal, ownership transfer, and inspection coordination', 'Vehicle export, import, number plate, and deregistration documentation support' ]

[ 'Passport copy', 'Emirates ID copy', 'UAE visa copy where applicable', 'Existing driving licence where applicable', 'Eye test or medical documents where required', 'Vehicle registration card where applicable', 'Insurance policy or inspection report where applicable', 'Traffic file or RTA reference number where available' ]
